name: Arc Wizards 2
short_description: The war of the wizards begins! This is a shooting action game!
detailed_description:
The war of the wizards begins!
This is an exciting action game with a 16-bit taste!


←↑→↓: move
X: Attack (Keyboard "A")
Y:Plasma shot (Need 1/3 Ppoint ) (Keyboard "D")
B:Force shield (Need 1 Point ) (Keyboard "W")

We recommend buying the bundle. They are all on 90% off.
